claim: For 1024 rows with vocab_size=1009, k=4, and temperature=0.8 on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, the block-level top-k temperature sampling seed measured 2.299615x faster than the one-thread-per-row baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: more parallel candidate selection per row
lower serial scan time per row
curation_note: timing-only odd-vocabulary sweep: HIP-event timings and deterministic CPU-reference correctness passed with zero top-k index, sample, top-k value, and probability mismatches, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment.
